common.tagline: An AI writing coach that trains your writing ability instead of replacing it.
common.comingSoonDesc: This feature is under development. Stay tuned.
common.networkError: Network error, please try again later

nav.footerTagline:
15 minutes a day
Train your own writing ability

landing.heroTitle:
15 minutes a day,
retrain your writing muscles
landing.heroDesc:
WriteFit is an AI writing coach. It doesn't write for you —
it helps you practice, revise, and build your own voice over time.
landing.tryDemo: Try the practice flow (no login needed) →

problems.title: Does this sound familiar?
items: You write fine sentences, but the whole piece feels hollow
You know what you want to say, but the words come out generic
AI can polish your text, but it sounds less like you
You've read a lot about writing, but your own writing hasn't improved
You start with strong ideas, but they get diluted by the third paragraph
You want a personal voice, but everything you write sounds like everyone else

steps.title: You write first
steps.desc: Write a short piece in 15 minutes. No AI help. Just you and the blank page.

steps.title: AI diagnoses
steps.desc: AI analyzes your writing and identifies 3 specific issues — not generic advice.

steps.title: You revise
steps.desc: Revise based on the feedback. The AI doesn't rewrite for you. You do the work.

steps.title: Compare versions
steps.desc: See exactly what changed between your original and revised versions.

steps.title: Save what works
steps.desc: Save good sentences and ideas to your personal library for future use.

items.title: Daily Practice
items.desc: A new writing prompt every day. 15 minutes. Different training types rotate through the week.

items.title: AI Diagnosis
items.desc: AI analyzes your writing for clarity, specificity, personal voice, and AI-like tone. Not a grammar checker — a writing coach.

items.title: Anti-AI Voice Training
items.desc: Detect and fix generic, template-like, over-smoothed writing. Build a voice that's unmistakably yours.

items.title: Sentence Surgery
items.desc: Take any sentence apart. Find empty words, abstract nouns, and rhythm problems. Fix them one by one.

items.title: Draft Lab
items.desc: Work on longer pieces. Track versions. Get feedback on revisions, not just first drafts.

items.title: Idea Library
items.desc: Save good sentences, observations, and insights from your practice. Build a personal writing resource.

scenarios.title: Who is WriteFit for?
items: Writers who feel their work has become too generic
Founders and makers who need to write clearly but struggle with words
People who write a lot but feel they're not improving
Anyone who wants to sound less like AI and more like themselves

cta.title: Start training your writing today
cta.desc: 15 minutes a day. No AI ghostwriting. Just you, getting better.

login.title: Log in to WriteFit
login.subtitle: 15 minutes a day, train your own writing ability

not write for you.

dashboard.dayOne: This is day 1 of your writing training. Start today's practice.
dashboard.noIdeas: No saved ideas yet. Complete a practice session to start collecting.
dashboard.noDrafts: No drafts yet. Start writing in the Draft Lab.

progress.title: Progress
progress.noSessions: No practice sessions yet. Start your first practice!

practice.promptPreview: Was there a moment today when your thinking was clear but your writing came out vague?

flow.devMode: Dev test mode — no login required, practice data won't be saved
flow.writingInstructions: Write freely. Don't edit, don't chase perfection. Just get what's in your head onto the page.
flow.revisionInstructions: Revise your writing based on the feedback
flow.completeMessage: Great work! You've completed today's practice.
flow.errorMinWords: At least {minWords} words required to submit
flow.errorAiDiagnosis: AI diagnosis failed, please try again
flow.errorCompareFailed: Comparison failed, but you can still view the diff

editor.placeholder: Start writing. Don't edit, don't chase perfection. Just get what's in your head onto the page.

feedback.mockNotice: ⚠ This is mock feedback. Configure your AI API key to get real AI diagnosis.

settings.title: Settings
settings.comingSoon: More settings (profile, notification preferences, etc.) coming soon

ai.notConfiguredDesc: Configure to use AI diagnosis, anti-AI voice detection, and other features. Without configuration, only mock feedback is available.
ai.title: AI Service Configuration
ai.providerDesc: Select your AI service. Any OpenAI-compatible API format is supported.
ai.apiUrlDesc: The API URL for your AI service. Select 'Custom' to enter any OpenAI-compatible URL.
ai.getKeyDesc: Click here to get {provider} API key
ai.maxTokensDesc: Limit the maximum length of AI responses
ai.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear AI settings?
ai.confirmClearDesc: You'll need to reconfigure to use AI features.
ai.fillComplete: Please fill in all required fields
ai.errorModel: Please select or enter a model name
ai.apiKeyStorageDesc: Your API Key is stored only in your browser (dev) or encrypted in the database (production).

aiSetup.title: Configure your AI writing coach
aiSetup.desc: WriteFit uses your own AI API key to provide writing feedback. Your key is stored securely and only used for your own requests.

dev.title: Dev Test
dev.desc: This mode allows you to test the practice flow without logging in. Practice data will not be saved to the database.
